Subject: EvaluationAssessmentExercise
Rationale: Requires evaluatesTopicAwarenessOf to connect assessment exercises to topics, with Topic as the allowed value type and at least one evaluated topic for each assessment exercise.

Subject: EvaluationAssessmentExercise
Rationale: Requires assessment exercises to have a workload classification, constrains that value to WorkloadLevel, and allows exactly one workload level per assessment exercise.

Subject: EvaluationAssessmentExercise
Rationale: Requires assessment exercises to use at least one evaluation technique, with each usesTechnique value constrained to EvaluationTechnique.

Subject: EvaluationMetric
Rationale: Requires evaluation metrics to have a literal string representation and allows at most one asString value per evaluation metric.

Subject: EvaluationResult
Rationale: Requires any resource using hasUnit to be treated as an EvaluationResult, constrains the unit to EvaluationMetric, and requires each evaluation result to have at least one unit.

Subject: EvaluationResult
Rationale: Requires evaluation results to have at least one literal value, with each hasValue value constrained to rdfs:Literal.

Subject: EvaluationResult
Rationale: Requires EvaluationResult to be a specialized kind of Response so evaluation results inherit response semantics.

Subject: EvaluationTechnique
Rationale: Requires assessesLearningFeedback links to identify evaluation techniques when they point to learning feedback, constrains values to LearningFeedback, and permits the relation when feedback assessment is relevant.

Subject: EvaluationTechnique
Rationale: Requires assessesLearningObjective links to identify evaluation techniques when they point to learning objectives, constrains values to LearningObjective, and permits the relation when objective assessment is relevant.

Subject: EvaluationTechnique
Rationale: Requires any resource using hasEvaluationMetric to be treated as an EvaluationTechnique, constrains values to EvaluationMetric, and requires each evaluation technique to have at least one metric.

Subject: EvaluationTechnique
Rationale: Requires hasEvaluationTechniqueType links to classify evaluation techniques by controlled technique types, constrains values to EvaluationTechniqueType, and requires each evaluation technique to have at least one type.

Subject: EvaluationTechnique
Rationale: Requires provideFeedback links to identify evaluation techniques when they produce responses, and permits feedback responses without requiring every evaluation technique to provide one.

Subject: LearningFeedback
Rationale: Requires learning feedback to be able to affect learning strategies when relevant, with each affectsStrategy value constrained to LearningStrategy.

Subject: LearningFeedback
Rationale: Requires any resource using hasLearningFeedbackType to be treated as LearningFeedback, constrains values to LearningFeedbackType, requires each feedback item to have a type, and allows exactly one feedback type per feedback item.

Subject: LearningFeedback
Rationale: Requires LearningFeedback to be a specialized kind of Response so feedback inherits response semantics.

Subject: Media
Rationale: Requires media resources to be able to include assessment exercises when relevant, with each hasAssessmentExercise value constrained to EvaluationAssessmentExercise.

Subject: Module
Rationale: Requires modules to include at least one assessment exercise, with each hasAssessmentExercise value constrained to EvaluationAssessmentExercise.

Subject: Response
Rationale: Requires any resource using affectsAwarenessObservation to be treated as a Response, constrains values to AwarenessObservation, and permits responses to affect awareness observations when relevant.

Subject: Response
Rationale: Requires any resource using hasResponseTime to be treated as a Response, constrains values to TemporalExtent, permits response timing when available, and allows at most one response time per response.

Subject: Response
Rationale: Requires any resource using hasSource to be treated as a Response, constrains values to Source, requires each response to have a source, and allows exactly one source per response.

Subject: Source
Rationale: Requires Source to be a specialized kind of Agent so response provenance is tied to an agentive origin.

Subject: AccessibilityChallenge
Rationale: Requires AccessibilityChallenge to be a specialized kind of LearningChallenge so accessibility needs are represented as learner challenges.

Subject: AwarenessObservation
Rationale: Requires any resource using atTime to be treated as an AwarenessObservation, constrains values to TemporalExtent, permits timestamping when available, and allows at most one time value per awareness observation.

Subject: AwarenessObservation
Rationale: Requires any resource using hasAwarenessLevel to be treated as an AwarenessObservation, constrains values to AwarenessLevel, requires each awareness observation to have a level, and allows exactly one level per observation.

Subject: AwarenessObservation
Rationale: Requires any resource using onSkill to be treated as an AwarenessObservation, constrains values to Skill, and permits skill-scoped awareness observations when relevant.

Subject: AwarenessObservation
Rationale: Requires any resource using onTopic to be treated as an AwarenessObservation, constrains values to Topic, and permits topic-scoped awareness observations when relevant.

Subject: CurrentAwarenessObservation
Rationale: Requires CurrentAwarenessObservation to be a specialized kind of AwarenessObservation for representing the active awareness state.

Subject: Learner
Rationale: Requires any resource using hasAwarenessObservation to be treated as a Learner, constrains values to AwarenessObservation, and permits learners to have awareness observations when available.

Subject: Learner
Rationale: Requires any resource using hasGoal to be treated as a Learner, constrains values to LearnerGoal, and permits learners to have goals when available.

Subject: Learner
Rationale: Requires any resource using hasLearnerPreference to be treated as a Learner, constrains values to LearnerPreference, and permits learners to have preferences when available.

Subject: Learner
Rationale: Requires any resource using hasLearningChallenge to be treated as a Learner, constrains values to LearningChallenge, and permits learners to have learning challenges when available.

Subject: Learner
Rationale: Requires any resource using hasSituation to be treated as a Learner, constrains values to LearningSituation, and requires each learner to have at least one learning situation.

Subject: Learner
Rationale: Requires Learner to be a specialized kind of Agent so learners inherit agent semantics.

Subject: LearnerGoal
Rationale: Requires any resource using targetsSkill to be treated as a LearnerGoal, constrains values to Skill, and requires each learner goal to target at least one skill.

Subject: LearningObjective
Rationale: Requires any resource using developsSkill to be treated as a LearningObjective, constrains values to Skill, and requires each learning objective to develop at least one skill.

Subject: LearningSituation
Rationale: Requires any resource using scopes to be treated as a LearningSituation, constrains values to Persona, and permits learning situations to be scoped by persona when relevant.

Subject: Skill
Rationale: Requires any resource using requiresTopic to be treated as a Skill, constrains values to Topic, and requires each skill to require at least one topic.

Subject: LearningSituation
Rationale: Requires any resource using requiresPriorTopicKnowledge to be treated as a LearningSituation, constrains values to Topic, and permits learning situations to specify prior topic knowledge when relevant.

Subject: LearningObjective
Rationale: Requires any resource using worksOnSituation to be treated as a LearningObjective, constrains values to LearningSituation, and permits learning objectives to address learning situations when relevant.

Subject: Media
Rationale: Requires any resource using supportsLearningObjective to be treated as Media, constrains values to LearningObjective, and requires each media resource to support at least one learning objective.

Subject: Module
Rationale: Requires modules to have at least one learning objective, with each hasLearningObjective value constrained to LearningObjective.

Subject: LearningObjective
Rationale: Requires learning objectives to be able to carry a textual description when available, constrains description values to xsd:string, and allows at most one description per learning objective.

Subject: LearningObjective
Rationale: Requires learning objectives to have a name, constrains name values to xsd:string, and allows at most one name per learning objective.

Subject: LearningStrategy
Rationale: Requires learning strategies to be able to carry a textual description when available, constrains description values to xsd:string, and allows at most one description per learning strategy.

Subject: LearningStrategy
Rationale: Requires learning strategies to include at least one learning objective, with each hasLearningObjective value constrained to LearningObjective.

Subject: LearningStrategy
Rationale: Requires learning strategies to have a name, constrains name values to xsd:string, and allows exactly one name per learning strategy.

Subject: LearningStrategy
Rationale: Requires any resource using hasPedagogicalTechnique to be treated as a LearningStrategy, constrains values to PedagogicalTechnique, and requires each learning strategy to include at least one pedagogical technique.

Subject: LearningObjective
Rationale: Requires any resource using alignedWith to be treated as a LearningObjective, constrains values to PedagogicalElement, and permits learning objectives to align with pedagogical elements when relevant.

Subject: PedagogicalTechnique
Rationale: Requires any resource using targetsLearningObjective to be treated as a PedagogicalTechnique, constrains values to LearningObjective, and permits techniques to target learning objectives when relevant.

Subject: FirstPedagogicalElement
Rationale: Requires FirstPedagogicalElement to be a specialized kind of PedagogicalElement for identifying the start of a pedagogical sequence.

Subject: LastPedagogicalElement
Rationale: Requires LastPedagogicalElement to be a specialized kind of PedagogicalElement for identifying the end of a pedagogical sequence.

Subject: PedagogicalElement
Rationale: Requires pedagogical elements to be able to carry a textual description when available, constrains description values to xsd:string, and allows at most one description per pedagogical element.

Subject: PedagogicalElement
Rationale: Requires pedagogical elements to have a name, constrains name values to xsd:string, and allows exactly one name per pedagogical element.

Subject: PedagogicalElement
Rationale: Requires any resource using hasNextPedagogicalElement to be treated as a PedagogicalElement, constrains values to PedagogicalElement, and permits sequence links to the next element when relevant.

Subject: PedagogicalElement
Rationale: Requires any resource using hasPreviousPedagogicalElement to be treated as a PedagogicalElement, constrains values to PedagogicalElement, and permits sequence links to the previous element when relevant.

Subject: PedagogicalElement
Rationale: Requires any resource using isElementOf to be treated as a PedagogicalElement, constrains values to PedagogicalFramework, and permits elements to be assigned to frameworks when relevant.

Subject: PedagogicalFramework
Rationale: Requires pedagogical frameworks to be able to carry a textual description when available, constrains description values to xsd:string, and allows at most one description per framework.

Subject: PedagogicalFramework
Rationale: Requires any resource using hasElement to be treated as a PedagogicalFramework, constrains values to PedagogicalElement, and requires each pedagogical framework to have at least one element.

Subject: PedagogicalFramework
Rationale: Requires pedagogical frameworks to have a name, constrains name values to xsd:string, and allows exactly one name per framework.

Subject: PedagogicalObjective
Rationale: Requires pedagogical objectives to be able to carry a textual description when available, constrains description values to xsd:string, and allows at most one description per pedagogical objective.

Subject: PedagogicalObjective
Rationale: Requires pedagogical objectives to have a name, constrains name values to xsd:string, and allows exactly one name per pedagogical objective.

Subject: PedagogicalTechnique
Rationale: Requires pedagogical techniques to be able to carry a textual description when available, constrains description values to xsd:string, and allows at most one description per pedagogical technique.

Subject: PedagogicalTechnique
Rationale: Requires pedagogical techniques to have a name, constrains name values to xsd:string, and allows exactly one name per pedagogical technique.

Subject: PedagogicalTechnique
Rationale: Requires any resource using servesPedagogicalObjective to be treated as a PedagogicalTechnique, constrains values to PedagogicalObjective, and requires each pedagogical technique to serve at least one pedagogical objective.

Subject: PedagogicalTechnique
Rationale: Requires any resource using supportsPedagogicalElement to be treated as a PedagogicalTechnique, constrains values to PedagogicalElement, and permits techniques to support pedagogical elements when relevant.
